steps.title: Emphasize Sirius A
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the mass of Sirius A. The relevant note says Sirius A has a mass of 2.063 solar masses, so the best choice must foreground that star and that measurement.

steps.title: Reject other focuses
steps.content: A and C focus on Proxima Centauri, and B explains the unit of solar masses without naming Sirius A. The choice that opens with Sirius A's exact mass directly accomplishes the student's goal. The answer is D.
